rationale: The Russia-Ukraine war continues at its established high baseline; Trump's public criticism of Israeli Beirut strikes and resulting Iran deal uncertainty adds friction to Western diplomatic bandwidth relevant to Ukraine's support.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — active combat continues
top_events.summary: War continues with no qualitative change this cycle; daily life in Ukraine remains severely affected by ongoing combat, strikes, and mobilization.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Trump's public friction with Israel over Beirut strikes risks diverting US diplomatic focus from Ukraine and complicates the broader Western alliance posture that Ukraine depends on.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
top_events.summary: A human-interest story about Russian grief over war casualties; no direct operational impact on Ukraine but reflects the scale of Russian losses and societal war fatigue.
